steps.title: Use the variety clue
steps.content: The passage says folk and traditional art includes a wide variety of forms, then contrasts storytelling and quilting as examples. The blank must express that these art forms are unlike each other.

steps.title: Reject illogical relationships
steps.content: Choice A suggests the arts benefit each other, Choice B does not make sense with one another, and Choice D suggests the arts are mistakenly mixed up. The phrase meaning unlike each other supports the point about variety. The answer is C.
